HGSS.740.0000:
Monica: Glad to meet you. I’m Monica
of Monday.\f
As a token of our friendship, I have a
gift for you!\f
HGSS.740.0001:
Monica: It’s an item that raises the
power of Flying-type moves.\f
You should equip a bird Pokémon with
that item.
HGSS.740.0002:
Monica: My brothers and sisters are all
over the place.\f
See if you could find them all!
HGSS.740.0003:
Monica: Oh no! Today isn’t Monday.
See you another time!
HGSS.740.0004:
Tuscany: Please allow me to introduce
myself. I am Tuscany of Tuesday.\f
By way of introduction, please accept
this gift, a TwistedSpoon.\f
HGSS.740.0005:
Tuscany: Wouldn’t you agree that it is
most adorable?\f
It strengthens Psychic-type moves.\f
I am certain it will be of use.
HGSS.740.0006:
Tuscany: Have you met Monica, my older
sister?\f
Or my younger brother, Wesley?\f
I am the second of seven children.
HGSS.740.0007:
Tuscany: Tuesday was over before I
even noticed...\f
I’ll see you again next Tuesday...
HGSS.740.0008:
Wesley: I’m Wesley of Wednesday.\f
Pleased to meet you. Please take a
souvenir.\f
HGSS.740.0009:
Wesley: Black Belt beefs up the power
of Fighting-type moves.
HGSS.740.0010:
Wesley: Since you found me, you must
have met my brothers and sisters.\f
Or did you just get lucky?
HGSS.740.0011:
Wesley: No way!
Wednesday’s already over!\r
See you next week!
HGSS.740.0012:
Arthur: Who are you?\f
I’m Arthur of Thursday.\f
Here, take this!\f
HGSS.740.0013:
Arthur: If you use Rock-type moves,
you should give that to your Pokémon.\f
It raises the strength of
Rock-type moves.
HGSS.740.0014:
Arthur: I’m Arthur of Thursday!
I’m the second son in a line of seven\r
siblings!
HGSS.740.0015:
Arthur: Do you think that the middle of
the week is Wednesday?\r
Or do you think it’s Thursday?\f
Go decide, and I’ll see you
next Thursday!
HGSS.740.0016:
Frieda: Yahoo! It’s Friday!\f
I’m Frieda of Friday!
Nice to meet you!\f
Here’s a Poison Barb for you!\f
HGSS.740.0017:
Frieda: Give it to a Pokémon that has
Poison-type moves.\f
Oh! It’s wicked!\f
You’ll be shocked how good it makes
Poison-type moves!
HGSS.740.0018:
Frieda: Hiya! What day do you like?\f
I love Friday. No doubt about it!\f
Don’t you think it’s great too?
HGSS.740.0019:
Frieda: Oh, today’s not Friday?\f
Man... I wish every day were Friday,
that’d be so much fun!
HGSS.740.0020:
Santos: ...It’s Saturday...\f
I’m Santos of Saturday...\f
Take this...\f
HGSS.740.0021:
Santos: ...\f
Soft Sand...\f
Ground-type moves get stronger...
It will startle you...
HGSS.740.0022:
Santos: ...\f
See you again on another Saturday...
HGSS.740.0023:
Santos: Today’s Saturday...
No... Wait... Huh?\f
I’ll see you next Saturday then...
HGSS.740.0024:
Sunny: Hi! I’m Sunny of Sunday, meaning
it’s Sunday today!\f
I was told to give you this if I saw you!\f
HGSS.740.0025:
Sunny: That thing...\f
Um...\f
...What was it now...\f
...\f
Oh! I remember now!\f
A Pokémon that knows Electric-type
moves should hold it.\f
My sis Monica said it powers up
Electric-type moves!
HGSS.740.0026:
Sunny: My sister Monica...
My sister Tuscany...\r
My brother Wesley...\r
My brother Arthur...\r
My sister Frieda...\r
And my brother Santos.\f
They’re all older than me!
HGSS.740.0027:
Sunny: Huh? Isn’t today Sunday?
Um... I forgot!
HGSS.740.0028:
Monica: Hey, you!
The one who found all of my siblings!\r
Yeah, you!\f
We’re pretty good friends now, don’t
you agree?\f
Since we’re such good friends, I’ll give
you this Alert Ribbon!\f
HGSS.740.0029:
Monica: That Alert Ribbon looks great
on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0031:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
HGSS.740.0032:
Tuscany: Hey, you!
The one who found all of my siblings!\r
Yeah, you!\f
We’re pretty good friends now, don’t
you agree?\f
Since we’re such good friends, I’ll give
you this Shock Ribbon!\f
HGSS.740.0033:
Tuscany: That Shock Ribbon looks great
on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0035:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
HGSS.740.0036:
Wesley: Hey, you!
The one who found all of my siblings!\r
Yeah, you!\f
We’re pretty good friends now, don’t
you agree?\f
Since we’re such good friends, I’ll give
you this Downcast Ribbon!\f
HGSS.740.0037:
Wesley: That Downcast Ribbon looks
great on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0039:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
HGSS.740.0040:
Arthur: Hey, you found all of my
siblings, didn’t you!\f
We’re pretty good friends now, don’t
you agree?\f
Since we’re such good friends, I’ll give
you this Careless Ribbon!\f
HGSS.740.0041:
Arthur: That Careless Ribbon looks
great on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0043:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
HGSS.740.0044:
Frieda: Hey, you’re the one who found
all of my siblings, aren’t you!\f
We’re pretty good friends now, don’t
you agree?\f
Since we’re such good friends, I’ll give
you this Relax Ribbon!\f
HGSS.740.0045:
Frieda: That Relax Ribbon looks great
on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0047:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
HGSS.740.0048:
Santos: ...
You found all of my siblings...\f
We’re pretty good friends...
...Right?\f
Here... Have this Snooze Ribbon...\f
HGSS.740.0049:
Santos: That Snooze Ribbon looks good
on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0051:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
HGSS.740.0052:
Sunny: Hey, you found all of my siblings!\f
We’re pretty good friends now, right?\f
Since we’re such good friends, I’ll give
you this Smile Ribbon!\f
HGSS.740.0053:
Sunny: That Smile Ribbon looks great
on your Pokémon...
HGSS.740.0055:
You can only get one ribbon per week...\f
If you want another ribbon, come find
me again next week!
